publishedAbstract: * Data loss has been acccepted and a NooBaa rebuild or backingstore deletion is executed but fails to delete. * NooBaa BackingStore/NamespaceStore, for example: The "noobaa-default-backing-store" cannot be deleted due to an `"IN_USE"` state.
publishedTitle: Unable to Delete Backingstore or Rebuild NooBaa (MCG) "Error from server: admission webhook "admissionwebhook.noobaa.io" denied the request: cannot complete because pool "noobaa-default-backing-store" in "IN_USE" state"
